data.problem: Alice has 3 apples and gets 2 more. How many does she have?
A train travels 60 miles in 2 hours. How many miles per hour?
Bob has 12 candies and gives 4 away. How many remain?
There are 7 birds; 3 fly away. How many remain?
A box has 6 pencils per row and 4 rows. How many pencils total?
